title: Per-worktree container isolation for parallel AI-agent development

steps.description: Add worktree_db_port, worktree_app_port, worktree_compose_path nullable columns to batch_items + Alembic migration + schema docs
Review S01 — schema additions, migration shape, ORM consistency, docs
Create orch/daemon/worktree_compose.py module (compose render + port discovery + env rewrite + seed runner) + relax safe_migrate.AgentContextForbiddenError for per-worktree DB
Review S03 — subprocess safety, idempotency, failure paths, no secrets in logs, safe_migrate relax scope
Container reaper + daemon-restart re-attach + lifecycle hooks in batch_manager (up after worktree_setup, down on terminal transitions)
Review S05 — lifecycle hook completeness, reaper classification correctness, idempotency, daemon-restart re-attach
iw-ai-core reference iw-config (compose template, env.toml, seed.sh) + step prompt placeholder substitution + audit existing prompts + IW_CORE_PER_WORKTREE_DB env flag at agent launch
Review S07 — compose template renders, env.toml schema, seed.sh safety, placeholder substitution, prompt audit completeness, IW_CORE_PER_WORKTREE_DB flag set correctly
Extend Worktree Health view (system/worktrees.html) with container columns, orphan flag, per-row Open/Logs/Force-teardown actions
Review S09 — performance (no N+1 docker calls), CSRF, htmx fragments, JS lint, accessibility

Comprehensive test suite — unit (worktree_compose, reaper, safe_migrate, prompt substitution) + integration (parallel isolation AC2, daemon-restart re-attach AC5, real-container reaper AC4, legacy fallback AC7, executor docker-free Invariant #1)
Review S11 — AC coverage map (10 ACs), Invariant coverage map (10 invariants), test isolation, no live-DB pollution
Docs — NEW docs/IW_AI_Core_Worktree_Isolation.md + UPDATE Daemon_Design + Agent_Constraints + CLAUDE.md (+orch +tests +executor) Quick Navigation/Critical Rules
Final cross-layer review — completeness vs design, cross-agent consistency, CR-00021 unaffected, browser_env unaffected, executor docker-free, no secrets in logs, all ACs and Invariants enforced
QV: Linting (ruff + node --check on dashboard JS)
